About the Initiative

A Social Contract,
Not a Sticker.

The Road Safety Pledge is a structured commitment initiative designed and implemented by ADPS — Africa Development Program Services — to cultivate a lasting culture of responsibility on Mauritian roads. It is not a government programme, not an awareness poster. It is a personal promise, made publicly.

We spend our lives planning for the future — but a single distracted second can erase it. Today you drive with your child in the back seat. Tomorrow, they will be the ones behind the wheel.

The road culture you build now is the world they inherit.

By signing, you are not claiming to be a perfect driver. You are making a public promise to every family on this island, including your own — that every chair at your dinner table should stay filled.

Drive like your family is in the other car.
Core Message · ADPS Road Safety Pledge · Mauritius
🚗
No Speeding
Commit to respecting speed limits and road conditions at all times.
📵
No Distracted Driving
Full attention on the road — every trip, no exceptions.
🚫
Zero Drunk Driving
Never drive under the influence. If in doubt — don't drive.
🚶
Respect All Road Users
Give way to pedestrians. Protect cyclists. Show patience.
🔄
Annual Commitment
The pledge renews yearly — safety is not a checkbox, it is a continuing choice.
🌍
Community First
Every Rs 100 contribution goes directly to awareness and school programmes.
Sign the Pledge

Make Your Commitment

The ADPS Road Safety Pledge

Mauritius · Annual Commitment · Rs 100 per Vehicle

I make a voluntary and conscious commitment to drive with care, with respect, and with the understanding that my actions on the road affect every family I share it with.

  • ✓I will not speed, and will always adapt my driving to road and weather conditions.
  • ✓I will never use my phone or engage in any distracted behaviour while driving.
  • ✓I will never drive under the influence of alcohol, drugs, or any impairing substance.
  • ✓I will respect pedestrians, cyclists, and all vulnerable road users.
  • ✓I will not engage in reckless, aggressive, or dangerous driving behaviour.
  • ✓I will encourage those around me — family, friends, colleagues — to drive responsibly.
  • ✓I understand this pledge is a personal commitment. It does not confer legal immunity or guarantee any safety outcome.
⚠ Important: Participation is a voluntary expression of intent. It does not modify legal liability or guarantee safety outcomes. A conscious mind is what stops accidents — not a sticker.
Optional — but it makes the pledge personal.
Type your initials to sign the pledge. This is your personal digital signature — a conscious act of commitment.
A full copy of this pledge will be sent with your badge.
🙌

Want to make a greater impact?

Some supporters choose to contribute more than Rs 100 to help fund additional school workshops and community awareness. If you'd like to, you're welcome to — every extra rupee makes a difference. Let us know or mention it when we follow up.

You will receive your Pledge Badge, digital certificate, and a copy of your signed pledge.
Payment details will be confirmed upon registration.

Companies, fleet operators, insurers, and institutions can join as programme partners — demonstrating real responsibility while contributing to safer roads across Mauritius.
